title: Prediction: This AI Stock Will Be the Nasdaq's Best Performer by the End of 2026
text: The Motley Fool article predicts that Sandisk (SNDK) will be the Nasdaq's best-performing stock by the end of 2026. Sandisk has experienced extraordinary growth following its February 2025 spin-off from Western Digital. The stock jumped nearly 560% in 2025 and continues its momentum with a 526.4% year-to-date gain in 2026, significantly outpacing other Nasdaq-100 stocks. Fiscal Q3 2026 results showed impressive metrics: revenue reached $5.95 billion (up 251% year-over-year), while the company swung from a $1.93 billion loss to $3.61 billion in net income. Data center revenue was particularly strong, surging 645% year over year to $1.46 billion. Sandisk benefits from the global AI buildout through its data storage, edge computing, and data center products. The global AI market is expected to grow from $390.9 billion in 2025 to $3.5 trillion by 2033.
